mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_like (id, article_id, user_id, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{articleId}, #{userId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted}, #{deletedTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, article_id, user_id, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE article_like SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT article_id FROM article_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 1
SELECT article_id FROM article_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 1 AND deleted_time >= #{afterTime}
